en.hero_desc: Data and AI enthusiast with strong experience in machine learning, system development, and cross-functional collaboration. This portfolio highlights my education, certifications, project journey, and practical impact.
en.about_lead: Building practical technology solutions with clear communication and data-driven thinking.
en.about_p1: AI-focused Data Scientist and Machine Learning Engineer with a strong foundation in modeling and end-to-end ML development. Experienced in designing robust machine learning pipelines, optimizing deep learning architectures, and delivering high-performance predictive models. Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and SQL, with expertise in feature engineering, model optimization, and evaluation strategies. Driven to build scalable, production-oriented AI solutions that generate measurable business and research impact.
en.about_p2: Known for clear and confident communication, with experience presenting technical material in both academic and organizational settings.
en.about_p3: Passionate about data-driven innovation and eager to contribute to collaborative, solution-focused environments.
en.gallery_lead: Personal moments and visual snapshots from my professional journey.
en.publications_lead: Research contributions in cybersecurity, machine learning, and network traffic analysis.
en.contact_desc: This portfolio reflects my passion for continuous learning and creating innovative solutions. Let's discuss how we can build something great together.
en.meta_desc: Portfolio of Muhamad Aditya Darmawan, Informatics graduate focused on Data, AI Engineering, and project delivery.
en.meta_og_desc: Explore projects and experience in Data, AI Engineering, and system development.

id.hero_desc: Data and AI enthusiast with strong experience in machine learning, system development, and cross-functional collaboration. This portfolio highlights my education, certifications, project journey, and practical impact.
id.about_lead: Membangun solusi teknologi yang praktis dengan komunikasi yang jelas dan pola pikir berbasis data.
id.about_p1: Data Scientist yang berfokus pada AI dan Machine Learning dengan fondasi yang kuat dalam pemodelan serta pengembangan ML end-to-end. Berpengalaman dalam merancang pipeline machine learning yang tangguh, mengoptimalkan arsitektur deep learning, dan menghasilkan model prediktif berkinerja tinggi. Terbiasa menggunakan Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, dan SQL, dengan keahlian dalam rekayasa fitur, optimasi model, serta strategi evaluasi. Termotivasi untuk membangun solusi AI yang skalabel dan berorientasi produksi, yang mampu memberikan dampak nyata bagi bisnis maupun penelitian.
id.about_p2: Dikenal dengan komunikasi yang jelas dan percaya diri, serta berpengalaman menyampaikan materi teknis dalam konteks akademik maupun organisasi.
id.about_p3: Memiliki semangat tinggi pada inovasi berbasis data dan siap berkontribusi dalam lingkungan kolaboratif yang berorientasi solusi.
id.gallery_lead: Momen personal dan cuplikan visual dari perjalanan profesional saya.
id.publications_lead: Kontribusi riset dalam keamanan siber, machine learning, dan analisis lalu lintas jaringan.
id.contact_desc: Portofolio ini merepresentasikan semangat saya untuk terus belajar dan menciptakan solusi inovatif. Mari diskusikan bagaimana kita bisa membangun sesuatu yang berdampak bersama.
id.meta_desc: Portofolio Muhamad Aditya Darmawan, lulusan Informatika dengan fokus pada Data, AI Engineering, dan eksekusi proyek.
id.meta_og_desc: Jelajahi proyek dan pengalaman di bidang Data, AI Engineering, dan pengembangan sistem.
